title: Therangen
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Therangen''' was a volatile [[Color/Legends|black]] rock used as fuel by less-technologically-advanced [[Species/Legends|races]]. It was a dangerous substance and it reacted violently to fire. [[Veren Gal]], an ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Archaeologist/Legends|archaeologist]], thought that the ancient Sith on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] used it as a power source. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] discovered a pillar of Therangen in [[Ajunta Pall]]'s Tomb, and was forced to use a [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] to destroy it to continue deeper into the tomb.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
